# שגיא אברהמי — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Shagai Avrahami is a premium web developer and digital experience creator whose personal brand is built around the metaphor of 'the digital as a universe' — galaxies, particles, light paths, and neural networks. The site is a single-file, highly animated landing page featuring Three.js 3D backgrounds (TorusKnot wireframe, star particle clouds, neuron-like connection lines), GSAP scroll animations with character stagger, magnetic CTA buttons, custom cursor with lerp, tilt cards with shine effects, and a full dark cosmic aesthetic. The brand communicates mastery, creativity, and premium craftsmanship through immersive visual storytelling across 7 sections: Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Stats (127 projects, 5 years, 98% satisfaction, 14 domains), Testimonials carousel, and a Contact CTA.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
שגיא אברהמי יוצר עבורך אתר פרימיום שהוא הרבה יותר מנוכחות ברשת — זו חוויה דיגיטלית יוקרתית שמשדרת עוצמה, חדשנות ואיכות ללא פשרות. לחץ כאן כדי להתחיל את המסע שלך ביקום הדיגיטלי.

### תודה על פנייתך
https://example.com/thank-you
שגיא אברהמי - תודה על פנייתך

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About שגיא אברהמי
Shagai Avrahami is a premium web developer and digital experience creator whose personal brand is built around the metaphor of 'the digital as a universe' — galaxies, particles, light paths, and neural networks. The site is a single-file, highly animated landing page featuring Three.js 3D backgrounds (TorusKnot wireframe, star particle clouds, neuron-like connection lines), GSAP scroll animations with character stagger, magnetic CTA buttons, custom cursor with lerp, tilt cards with shine effects, and a full dark cosmic aesthetic. The brand communicates mastery, creativity, and premium craftsmanship through immersive visual storytelling across 7 sections: Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Stats (127 projects, 5 years, 98% satisfaction, 14 domains), Testimonials carousel, and a Contact CTA.

## Target Audience
- בעלי עסקים פרימיום
- סטארט-אפים יוקרתיים

## Industry
Web Development & Digital Design
